html:
Exclusive to:

Tab Icon.

The Windows Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.

Craftable Items and Structures

The following items and structures can be acquired in the Windows Tab:

Name Recipe Description Spawn Code
Round Window Can't be crafted ???

Round Burlap Window		 ×3 "Simple natural light." window_round_burlap

Peaked Window		 ×3 "Hard wood, soft light." window_small_peaked

Square Window		 ×4 "Doubles as a tic-tac-toe board." window_large_square

Peaked Curtain Window		 ×3 "Frugal and functional." window_small_peaked_curtain

Tall Window		 ×4 "Well rounded." window_tall

Large Square Curtain Window		 ×5 "Comes with drapery." window_large_square_curtain

Tall Curtain Window		 ×5 "Fancy." window_tall_curtain

Greenhouse Wall		 ×8 "Sunlight and creepers."
Greenhouse Wall takes up a whole wall		 window_greenhouse

Exclusive to:
Tab Icon.
The Windows Tab is a crafting category exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found under the Renovate Tab.
Craftable Items and Structures[edit | edit source]
The following items and structures can be acquired in the Windows Tab:

“A big window.”
–Wilson, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“A big window looking out into nothing.”
–Willow, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“Is window worthy of mighty Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“I prefer the dark and windowless depths of my soul.”

“Ideal for facilitating some of my botanical activities.”

“All that sunshine and nothing to keep it out.”

–Wagstaff, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“A wall windöw thröugh which much light may enter.”

“Lets in the light.”
–Walani, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“If only I could grow greenhouse fresh produce.”
–Warly, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“'tis a grand porthole!”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“'TIS WINDOW O' BIGNESS”
–Wilba, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“Can see lots of outside!”
–Wormwood, when examining a Greenhouse Wall
“Reminds me there's a whole world out there full of adventure.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Greenhouse Wall

title: Windows Tab
wikitext:
{{Exclusivity|Hamlet}} [[File:Windows.png|thumb|104x104px|Tab Icon.]] The '''Windows Tab''' is a crafting category exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC.
